description_long: This is a modern sports car with a striking two-tone paint job, featuring a vibrant pink upper body and a deep blue lower section. The car has an aggressive front fascia with a wide grille, prominent hood vents, and sleek, angular headlights. Its aerodynamic profile is accentuated by a sloping roofline, sculpted side panels, and a subtle rear lip spoiler. The vehicle sits on black, multi-spoke alloy wheels, and the side mirrors and roof are finished in a contrasting dark color. The rear showcases dual exhaust pipes, distinctive taillights, and a circular emblem at the center of the trunk. The windows are tinted, and the overall design suggests high performance and urban style.
description: A vibrant pink and blue sports car with an aggressive front, sculpted body, and black multi-spoke wheels. Features include hood vents, dual exhausts, and a sleek, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view highlighting the wide grille, hood vents, and angular headlights.
description_view_1: Side profile showing the two-tone paint, sloping roofline, and black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the dual exhausts, taillights, and circular trunk emblem.
description_view_3: Rear-side view emphasizing the rear window, subtle spoiler, and sculpted side panels.
